-## ⚠️ KEY STRATEGIC CHANGE: Plan C T5→T4 + Price Raise (Week 12)
-
-### Why T4 for Plan C (CRITICAL ECONOMICS):
-- T5 compute: $0.03/unit, Plan C users use ~170-180 units/sub/day = $4.50-5.10/sub/day compute
-- T4 compute: $0.012/unit = $1.80-2.16/sub/day
-- **Revenue at $89.99: $3/day/sub > compute $2/day/sub → POSITIVE contribution!**
-- With T5 at ANY price: compute exceeded revenue per sub → business gets WORSE at scale
-- **Estimated compute savings: ~$658/day immediately**
-
-### Quality After T4 Change:
-- S2 Plan C (T4): 0.4972 (was 0.5469 at T5) — 11% quality premium over Plan B still
-- S3 Plan C (T4): 0.4393 (from 0.4832)
-- S2 Plan B (T3): 0.4475 (UNCHANGED — still recovering)
-- Quota differentiation (20K vs 8K) maintains Plan C value vs Plan B
-
-### Risk Mitigation:
-- Tenure loyalty bonus (+0.07 for 3-month subs) protects existing Plan C subs at billing
-- Lead promo 15% for S2 reduces effective price → lower threshold for new leads
-- By Day 91: Plan C T4 quality grows to 0.4709+ via dev spend → comfortably above threshold
